title: WorkCanvas’ experience inside monday is officially LIVE 🎉

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
This one is for the community.
A lot of what you’ll see here started with your feedback.

Many of you shared thoughts, requests, and honest opinions about how you want to brainstorm and plan inside monday - and this release reflects a lot of those conversations.

Here’s what you can do now:

  • Create a canvas from the (+) side panel or add it as a board view
  • AI-powered templates: describe what you’re trying to do and get a ready-to-use canvas in seconds
  • Planning → execution: turn any sticky note or shape into a monday item with one click
  • Always in sync: Gantt, task cards, org charts & more update live between canvas and board
  • Built for collaboration: brainstorm, plan, and present together in real time

Go check it out, and let us know what you think.
Thoughts and feedback are very welcome in the comments.

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Yuval,

Are these updates being released gradually? I still can’t access canvas from the side panel.
